title: elytrigia acuta subsp. obtusiuscula
intro: Elytrigia acuta subsp. obtusiuscula, also known as a type of wild wheatgrass or slender wildrye, is a perennial grass native to mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health. In herbal preparations, Elytrigia acuta subsp. obtusiuscula is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
